description: The image presents a simple yet striking contrast between two elements: a square and a rectangle. The rectangle, set against a black background, is filled with a bold red color that stands out starkly. On the other hand, the square is white, providing a counterpoint to the red rectangle. The two geometric shapes are in close proximity, creating an interesting interplay of lines and angles. The image does not contain any text or additional objects, focusing solely on these two contrasting elements. The black background enhances the vibrancy of the red rectangle and the stark whiteness of the square, making them the focal points of this minimalist composition.
